info.name: TNT House Risk-Data API
info.description:
Solana token safety scoring + insider-cluster detection, built for AI trading agents. Free tier: 15 requests/day, no card required.

Get a free API key: https://tnt-audit.com/risk-api

How to use this collection:
1. Open the collection variables (top-right, or Collection > Variables tab).
2. Set `api_key` to your real key (starts with `tnt_sk_`).
3. Set `mint` to any Solana token mint address you want to check.
4. Run "Check Token Risk".

A fresh mint's first-ever check returns `cluster_analysis: "pending"` while insider detection runs in the background — re-run the request after ~1-2 minutes for the full result.

variable.description: Get a free key at https://tnt-audit.com/risk-api
Any Solana token mint address. Defaults to USDC's mint as a known-good example.

request.description:
Returns a 0-100 safety score, insider wallet clusters (wallets sharing a first-funder), mint/freeze authority status, holder concentration, and live market data for the given mint.

Responses also include X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset headers, and X-Credit-Balance-Usd once your key has a paid tier or credit balance.

Error codes: 400 (missing/invalid mint), 401 (missing/invalid key), 402 (limit reached, includes upgrade_url), 429 (rate limited), 502 (couldn't fetch on-chain data).

response.name: 200 OK — example
response.body:
{
  "mint": "EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v",
  "safety_score": 78,
  "cluster_analysis": "complete",
  "insider_clusters": [
    { "funder": "9xQe...k2Pd", "wallets": ["7uF3...aZ1", "3mN8...qR2"] }
  ],
  "mint_authority": { "revoked": true, "address": null },
  "freeze_authority": { "revoked": true, "address": null },
  "honeypot_risk": null,
  "lp_locked": null,
  "holder_distribution": {
    "risk_level": "LOW",
    "largest_holder_percent": 4.2,
    "top10_percent": 22.7,
    "holder_count": 20
  },
  "market": {
    "price_usd": 0.0000412,
    "liquidity_usd": 84210,
    "volume_24h_usd": 512300,
    "price_change_24h_percent": 12.4,
    "age_days": 3
  },
  "note": "honeypot_risk and lp_locked detection are on the roadmap and not yet implemented.",
  "checked_at": "2026-07-18T12:00:00.000Z"
}
